title: Iron Vanguard
description: An endless tower-defense game: command 16 turrets and 18 heroes, unleash skills, and hold the line against 35 monster types across 2000 levels.
longDescription: An endless tower-defense war in the browser. Command 16 turrets and 18 unique heroes, unleash devastating skills, and hold the line against 35 monster types and giant bosses across 2000 levels.
highlights: Free to play in the browser

title: Blade Rush
description: A fast arcade survivor game — spin a growing ring of blades, crush endless hordes, and out-duel rival warlords.
longDescription: A fast arcade survivor game. Spin a growing ring of blades, crush endless hordes, and out-duel rival warlords in quick, replayable runs.

title: Reconcile
description: A payment-ops puzzle game about reconciling transactions across Payment Gateway, Internal DB, and Bank Settlement — spot duplicates, refunds, and chargebacks.
longDescription: A puzzle game about reconciling payment transactions across three systems — Payment Gateway, Internal DB, and Bank Settlement. Spot duplicates, partial refunds, chargebacks, and missing orders before customers riot.

title: Snakes & Ladders
description: The classic board game online for 1–4 players — single-player vs bot or pass-and-play, with modern animations and realistic sound.
longDescription: The classic Snakes & Ladders online for 1–4 players. Play single-player against a bot or pass-and-play with friends, with modern animations and realistic sound effects — no download required.
highlights: No download — plays in the browser

title: Prize Gacha
description: An online gacha luck game — spin the gachapon, win prizes across Common to Mythic rarities, and share your wins. Plays right in the browser.
longDescription: An online gacha luck game. Spin the gachapon and win prizes across Common, Rare, Epic, Legendary, and Mythic rarities, then share your wins. Free, fun, and instantly playable in the browser.
